sagemaker.inferenceexperiment.datastorag:
The Amazon S3 location and configuration for storing inference request and response data. 

 This is an optional parameter that you can use for data capture. For more information, see [Capture data](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sagemaker/latest/dg/model-monitor-data-capture.html).

sagemaker.inferenceexperiment.datastorag.Description: Configuration specifying how to treat different headers. If no headers are specified SageMaker will by default base64 encode when capturing the data.
The Amazon S3 bucket where the inference request and response data is stored.
The AWS Key Management Service key that Amazon SageMaker uses to encrypt captured data at rest using Amazon S3 server-side encryption.
